556 P0100F_LMB_RSTRNT_CHR_CD P0100F_LMB_RSTRNT_CHR_CD P0100F Physical Restraints in Chair: Limb Restraint Chair Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a limb restraint in a chair was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
